summary: PR #2071 made non-matching progress in the camera module by replacing placeholders with C implementations for several camera functions, updating camera prototypes, adjusting formatting/stack locals in existing code, adding a grlib include, and touching camera static declarations. Bot output showed improvements for Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002D85C, and Camera_80030E44, while also reporting broken existing matches and regressions that are part of the PR evidence.

key_files.role: Main implementation file; added C bodies for Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002D85C, and Camera_80030E44, adjusted Camera_8002FEEC local order/PAD_STACK, and added grlib include.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/cm/camera.c replaces /// #Camera_8002CB0C, /// #Camera_8002CDDC, /// #Camera_8002D85C, and /// #Camera_80030E44 with implementations
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot reported improvements for Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002D85C, Camera_80030E44 and regressions for Camera_8002FEEC plus three broken matches

key_files.role: Public camera header; updated several prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or generic forms to typed signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_8002C5B4 changed to void Camera_8002C5B4(void*)
raw_diff: Camera_8002CB0C changed to void Camera_8002CB0C(CameraBounds*)
raw_diff: Camera_8002E234 changed to s32 Camera_8002E234(void)

key_files.role: Static camera declarations; PR attempted to remove static from cm_80453004 and review requested moving externally needed declarations to camera.h or removing the change.
evidence_refs: review_comments: ribbanya said if cm_80453004 needs access outside camera.c, move declaration to camera.h
review_comments: suggestion block requested deleting the non-static declaration change

what_changed.text: Added non-matching C implementations for Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002D85C, and Camera_80030E44 in src/melee/cm/camera.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: placeholder comments replaced by function bodies
pr_body: lists Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002D85C, Camera_80030E44 among non-matching improvements

what_changed.text: Camera_8002CB0C implementation handles camera input, stick thresholds, pause camera slot cycling, subject lookup, pause-eye vectors, zoom direction, and calls Camera_8002BAA8/Camera_8002BD88.
Camera_8002CDDC and Camera_8002D85C use fallback paths around Player_GetEntity, ftLib subject data, Ground_801C57A4, Stage camera helpers, and CameraTransformState updates.
Camera_80030E44 added a switch over arg0, calls grLib_801C9CEC, updates camera->_8C[arg0], and loops over camera->_B0 slots to install type/position data.
camera.h prototypes were made more specific for several functions, including Camera_8002C5B4, Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002D318, Camera_8002D85C, and Camera_8002E234.
Camera_8002FEEC had local declaration ordering and PAD_STACK changed, while a formatting-only cast spacing change was made in Camera_8002E948.
Automated report showed the PR improved four unmatched camera functions but also broke three previously matched camera functions and regressed Camera_8002FEEC and .bss matching.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01

smart_moves.text: The PR paired new function bodies with header prototype updates, reducing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS where the changed code provided typed call surfaces.
Camera_80030E44 added the needed grlib include rather than relying on an undeclared external call.
Reviewer caught declaration-scope risk in camera.static.h before treating a formerly static bss symbol as non-static.
evidence_refs: review_comments: ribbanya comment on moving declaration to camera.h if accessed outside camera.c
review_comments: deletion suggestion for cm_80453004 change

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering camera functions, update the owning camera header at the same time if the function body proves a narrower signature.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_8002CB0C implemented as void Camera_8002CB0C(CameraBounds*)
raw_diff: camera.h prototype changed from UNK_RET Camera_8002CB0C(UNK_PARAMS) to void Camera_8002CB0C(CameraBounds*)

decomp_lessons.lesson: A decomp PR that improves several unmatched functions can still disturb existing matched functions or data sections; retain the bot/checkdiff ledger as evidence instead of summarizing the PR as only progress.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot reported four unmatched-function improvements
text_corpus: bot reported three broken matches and regressions in .bss and Camera_8002FEEC

decomp_lessons.lesson: If a static-header declaration appears to need external visibility, reviewers expect it to move to the public owning header rather than simply dropping static in camera.static.h.
evidence_refs: review_comments: If this needs to be accessed outside of camera.c, move the declaration to camera.h
review_comments: suggestion to remove the non-static cm_80453004 declaration change

naming_conventions.text: The PR mostly retains address-style names for unrecovered camera functions and globals, such as Camera_8002CB0C, cm_80452C68, cm_803BCCA0, and cm_80453004, while using local role names such as camera, cam, bounds, transform, slot_ptr, pos_ptr, subject, and gobj.
New function parameters use explicit unused names for unused void* parameters in camera.h for Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002D318, and Camera_8002D85C.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The diff uses goto labels for loop and fallback structure in Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, and Camera_8002D85C, suggesting control-flow was kept close to decompiler or assembly shape for non-matching progress.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No PR comment states the author intentionally used gotos for matching; this is an observation from the diff only.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Camera_8002CB0C checks controller bitfields through 64-bit union members inputs.x18._u64 and inputs.x10._u64 with ULL constants.
Camera_8002FEEC changed PAD_STACK from 8 to 12 and reordered locals, which is a narrow stack/local-shape tactic but the loaded evidence also shows a regression for that function.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report listed Camera_8002FEEC regression from 99.38% to 92.07%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Camera_80030E44 uses a normal switch and for-loop shape for dispatch and slot scan.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_80030E44 for (i = 0; i < 4; i++) loop

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.text: Requested clang-format and provided command: clang-format -i -- src/**/**.{c,h}.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: review state CHANGES_REQUESTED with clang-format request
human_pr_text: issue comment quoting clang-format request
review_feedback.resolved_in_evidence: Author replied that precommit should have run and would fix; loaded evidence later includes an approval, but exact formatting fix commit is not shown in the slice.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.text: Commented that if cm_80453004 needs access outside camera.c, the declaration should move to camera.h.
review_feedback.resolved_in_evidence: Reviewer suggested deletion and author replied thanks; changed_files metadata shows camera.static.h net deletion, but the exact final diff for the file is truncated/not fully shown.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Reported 48.18% matched code overall, four unmatched-function improvements, three broken matches, and two regressions in unmatched/data areas.
review_feedback.resolved_in_evidence: No later bot report is loaded in the slice, so final post-fix matching status beyond merge is not established here.

The raw diff is marked truncated, so final details for camera.static.h and any later hunks are not fully visible from loaded diff.
The PR body explicitly calls the work non-matching improvements; do not record these implementations as matched functions.
The bot report shows regressions and broken matches, but no later bot/checkdiff report is loaded to show final post-review status.
Reviewer approval is present in text_corpus, but loaded evidence does not include the exact final formatting or declaration-scope edits.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update camera header prototypes when camera function bodies prove signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2071, new camera.c bodies were paired with camera.h changes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed signatures such as void Camera_8002CB0C(CameraBounds*) and s32 Camera_8002E234(void). This is local evidence for applying truthful header updates during camera decomp work.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not expose camera.static.h symbols by dropping static when camera.h should own external declarations
accepted_candidate_records.text: Review on PR #2071 objected to changing cm_80453004 from static to non-static in camera.static.h, saying externally needed access should move the declaration to camera.h.
evidence_refs: review_comments: deletion suggestion for cm_80453004 change

accepted_candidate_records.title: Non-matching progress can come with regressions; keep narrow report details
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2071's bot report recorded four camera function improvements but also three broken matches plus .bss and Camera_8002FEEC regressions, making the regression ledger important context for follow-up work.

source_update_candidates.title: Static-header declarations should not be made non-static for external access without moving ownership to the public header
source_update_candidates.text: Possible standard refinement: when a declaration in a .static.h file is needed outside its owning .c file, move the declaration to the appropriate public header rather than changing the static declaration in the static header. PR #2071 review stated this specifically for cm_80453004 in src/melee/cm/camera.static.h.
evidence_refs: review_comments: If this needs to be accessed outside of camera.c, move the declaration to camera.h
review_comments: suggestion deleting non-static cm_80453004 declaration
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with existing truthful-headers-and-includes guidance, but curator may decide whether to add a more explicit static-header rule.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/cm/camera.c camera decomp work may involve ftlib, ground, stage, and grlib dependencies
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2071 camera.c implementations used Player_GetEntity, ftLib_80086B74, ftLib_8008701C, Ground_801C57A4, Stage camera helpers, and grLib_801C9CEC; the diff added #include "gr/grlib.h".
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for future camera-module lookup; should be verified against current source before promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not promote Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002D85C, or Camera_80030E44 as matched; PR body calls the work non-matching improvements and the bot report shows partial percentages.
Do not infer final regression resolution from merge alone; the loaded slice has the initial bot report and approval but not a later clean report.
Do not generalize the goto-heavy shapes as preferred source style; the diff shows them, but no review or verifier evidence says they are intended final style.
Do not treat the Camera_8002FEEC PAD_STACK(12) change as an accepted tactic; the loaded bot report associates Camera_8002FEEC with a regression.
